name: @smithy-hono/deploy-aws
description: One-command AWS deploy for smithy-hono apps: given a domain, provisions a same-origin CloudFront distribution (S3 SPA origin + a Lambda API origin behind /api/*), a DynamoDB DataStore table and Secrets Manager secrets, generates/syncs secrets, builds the UI, and drives an idempotent CDK deploy — UI + API same-origin under an /api/* prefix. Config-driven via smithy-aws-deploy.config.{mjs,json}; node-only CLI. (Note: the private, non-published deploy/aws directory in this repo is an OLDER security-backend-only CDK app — DynamoDB + Secrets Manager + one sample Function-URL Lambda — NOT this CLI.)
